title: Youtube Poop - Strive for Love (Part Two)
description:
This video takes place a few days after part one. Minding his own business, the king daydreams about the mysterious genie who he saw a few days ago... but things quickly take a turn for the worst. =0

Comments are encouraged and appreciated!

Credit of "Gay King" picture goes to my good friend SuperVictoriaaa... at least I think thats what her latest account is. I don't know. If you like korean boybands *cough*XP*cough* check out her profile. LOL

Watch the entire series!
